speakers.name: Aakansha Doshi
speakers.biography: Aakansha is passionate about Free and open-source software (FOSS) and loves deep diving into the internals of Web and Javascript. She is a core maintainer of excalidraw, react-tags, mermaid-to-excalidraw and more. She also leads the FOSS meetups in Bangalore, India. Beyond her tech interests, she is a big foodie, loves traveling, and spending quality time with her family.
speakers.biographyJa: Aakansha is passionate about Free and open-source software (FOSS) and loves deep diving into the internals of Web and Javascript. She is a core maintainer of excalidraw, react-tags, mermaid-to-excalidraw and more. She also leads the FOSS meetups in Bangalore, India. Beyond her tech interests, she is a big foodie, loves traveling, and spending quality time with her family.

talk.title: Encrypting data in the Browser - Exploring Web Crypto APIs
talk.titleJa: Encrypting data in the Browser - Exploring Web Crypto APIs
talk.description:
Have you ever considered securing your app data within the browser? Let’s understand how encrypting your data in the browser enhances overall security.

In this talk Aakansha will be deep-diving into the world of Web Crypto APIs, starting from key generation, various encryption algorithms, implementation techniques, and more. The session will include live demos, coding examples, and a fun side project that she created as a result of learning about the Web Crypto APIs.

Let’s dive into the Web Crypto APIs together and explore its capabilities.
talk.descriptionJa:
ブラウザ内でアプリのデータを保護することを考えたことはありますか？ブラウザ内でデータを暗号化することで、全体的なセキュリティがどのように強化されるかを理解しましょう。

このトークでAakanshaは、鍵の生成から始まり、様々な暗号化アルゴリズム、実装テクニックなど、Web Crypto APIの世界に深く潜り込みます。 セッションには、ライブデモ、コーディング例、そしてWeb Crypto APIについて学んだ結果として彼女が作成した楽しいサイドプロジェクトが含まれます。

一緒にWeb Crypto APIに飛び込み、その機能を探求しましょう。
